scripts.dev: node -e "process.env.NODE_ENV='development'; require('node:child_process').spawnSync(process.platform === 'win32' ? 'pnpm.cmd' : 'pnpm', ['run', 'build'], { stdio: 'inherit', env: process.env }); require('node:child_process').spawnSync(process.execPath, ['--enable-source-maps', './dist/index.mjs'], { stdio: 'inherit', env: process.env });"
